## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and CreateAnything for AI-powered content marketing and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CreateAnything, a newly rebranded AI text-to-app platform, seeks to scale content marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content creation, SEO, and publishing services](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [Proposed engagement: 20k strategy sprint followed by 15k/month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Both parties express interest, pending final approval and addressing potential conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)

## Topics

### CreateAnything Overview

  - [Rebranded from create.xyz to createanything.com](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [AI text-to-app agent, focusing on native mobile app building](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Recently launched, quickly reaching $2M run rate revenue](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Target audience: entrepreneurs building and launching new products/services](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [Strong product retention and UGC loop driving current growth](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)

### GrowthX Services and Approach

  - [End-to-end partner for SEO, content strategy, creation, and CMS publishing](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [Combines AI workflows with human expertise (content marketing professionals)](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Two-phase engagement: Strategy Sprint (3-4 weeks) and Growth Execution](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Focuses on both SEO and AI answer optimization](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Experience with technical content (e.g., Augment Code, Okta)](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Robust fact-checking and research processes built into AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)

### Potential Partnership Considerations

  - [CreateAnything uses Sanity CMS, which GrowthX can work with](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [GrowthX has experience with seed/early-stage startups](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
  - [Timeline: Aiming for visible results before December to support fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)
  - [CreateAnything seeks balance between speed and building long-term authority](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
  - [Concerns about potential conflicts with existing clients (e.g., Lovable)](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)

### Next Steps and Open Questions

  - [GrowthX to send SOW and propose tentative October start date](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)
  - [Follow-up call to be scheduled with Zaria (CreateAnything's marketing lead)](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2189.0)
  - [GrowthX to confirm internally there's no conflict of interest](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2456.0)
  - [CreateAnything to review team members they'd be working with directly](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send SOW to Dhruv for review](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call with Dhruv and Zaria](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2189.0)
  - [Tyler to confirm with Marcel (GrowthX founder) about potential conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2456.0)
  - [Set tentative October date for Strategy Sprint kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)
  - [Dhruv to connect Tyler with Zaria for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/SZM92Gsvtk-hofiaVsgSieeyA3Rv8uzw?tab=summary&timestamp=2321.0)
